description: Query a rule's trigger history (covers `neomind rule history` — the read path for rule executions)

turns.user: Show me the trigger history of the rule-temp-alert rule.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes `neomind rule history rule-temp-alert` (or GET /api/rules/rule-temp-alert/history)
expectations.overall: Must actually query the history; an empty history is valid but must be stated explicitly
